metadata.review_guidance: Indemnity should be mutual for confidentiality breaches; vendor-only indemnity requires Legal approval and gross negligence trigger.
metadata.preferred_position: Each party shall indemnify the other against third-party claims arising from that party's gross negligence or willful misconduct.

sections.title: Indemnification
sections.text: Each party shall indemnify, defend, and hold harmless the other party against third-party claims arising from that party's gross negligence or willful misconduct.
